case_title: LLOYD K. MARCUS VS. ALMA MATER, INC.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALMA MATER, INC. IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUN-21-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. JOHN E. MARTIN APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE MOVING PARTY. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. JPT: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
